pageContext.name: Green Arrow
pageContext.description: I'm going to let you start running. When you're a dozen yards away, I'll try to bring you down. You could get lucky. I might miss.   Sideshow presents the Green Arrow Fine Art Print by Juan Ferreyra, a DC Comics artwork honoring the death and life of Oliver Queen.  Cloaked in his classic green hood, Green Arrow stares resolutely ahead. This powerful portrait depicts Ollie in bright white highlights as well as dark black shadows, showcasing the struggle between his identity as either hunter or hero. In front of his face, a luminous arrowhead symbolizes the vigilante's legacy as Star City's greatest archer.  Originally created as a cover for Green Arrow Rebirth Volume 1 written by Benjamin Percy for DC Comics, each Green Arrow Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This intense illustration is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 275 pieces.  Aim your DC Comics collection toward greatness when you bring home the Green Arrow Fine Art Print by Juan Ferreyra today!
